description: prod-tt-sasportal.googleapis.com is Google's testing endpoint for the SAS Portal API, part of the Spectrum Access System APIs used to manage CBRS network resources such as customers, nodes, deployments, and devices. It is a Google API service intended for programmatic access rather than a standalone end-user website.
summary: One authenticated HTTP REST API surface on prod-tt-sasportal.googleapis.com: the SAS Portal API (Testing), documented via Google Developers and protected by Google OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens plus an X-Goog-User-Project header.
